name: builtwithjon
title: Built with Jon — Hidden Profit tools
description: Free, public, read-only MCP server from Jonathan Malkin (AI Workflow Consultant & Implementation Partner). Tools: run the 3-minute Hidden Profit scorecard, put a dollar figure on an operational leak (missed calls, slow bids, no-shows, invoice aging, and more), browse a 96-example small-business automation use case library, read the decide-before-you-automate frameworks, and search ~50 articles.
